creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #1)

My wording did not deal with the RPi* support using a
distinct upstream's *.dtb files and RPi* firmware and
its own timing of updating against the upstream. (The
timing does not mess up non-RPi*'s.)

Still, the upstream *.dtb files (and more) are used
as-is and updates to the FreeBSD kernel and such can
be involved in having updated *.dtb and other files
before things work for such an update for the RPi*'s.
